headline: Sterling's Semiconductor Push: Is it the New Growth Engine?
summary: STRL lands a $500M+ first phase on a major U.S. semiconductor fab campus, adding a long-run growth lever beyond data centers.

headline: Marvell Stock Is Up 230% In 2026 — S&P 500 Debut Could Make That Look Conservative
summary: Marvell and Flex will join the S&P 500. MRVL stock is up 210% in 2021, driven by its role in AI infrastructure.

headline: 3 Quality Compounders to Target This Week
summary: Quality compounders are well-oiled machines. Their competitive advantages allow them to make profits consistently and reinvest them into projects that generate even more profits, creating a virtuous cycle of returns.
